name: Three Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Green beans, cooked/canned and drained
1 cup Canned red kidney beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a covered jar, combine oil, vinegar, garlic, mustard, basil, oregano, rosemary, parsley, and capers.
2. Mix well and set aside until ready to use.
3. To prepare the salad, combine green beans, garbanzo beans, and kidney beans with sliced onion in a large bowl.
4. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
5. Serve by scooping beans onto lettuce leaves.
6. Garnish with crumbled bacon.
